flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Stephen F Austin State University rose 43% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.6k → $9.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Stephen F Austin State University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (35.3% → 38.9%).
